response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's redevelopment. Although we successfully doubled the frame rate through optimization enhancements, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid effects and physics-based hair simulation, introduces performance considerations. We aim to maintain a balance between these advancements and system efficiency.  

Image #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character possesses a specific stomach capacity that dictates the amount of "body fluid" they can accommodate within their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can hold up to 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of semen during climax: a Dreamer typically expels 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may deposit 400-600ml into their partner.  

Images #2 and #3 showcase the newly implemented cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, resulting from testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  

Images #4 and #5 demonstrate dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands controlled via a VR controller.  

Images #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage equipment and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
